subcodes.first_line: There is no opportunity [to write at length]. Retribution is of two kinds: personal retribution is the requital of individual deeds, such as oppression and transgression [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: فرصت نیست پاداش دو قسم است خصوصی آن جزای اعمال خصوصیست مانند ظلم و طغیان
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for martyrs, @chastisement and requital, @consumption of meat; vegetarianism; diet, @prayer for pioneers and travel teachers, @music and singing
